title: epipactis hyblaea
intro: Epipactis hyblaea, also known as the Eastern Helleborine, is a type of orchid native to the mountainous regions of the Eastern United States. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Epipactis hyblaea has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
